biz_s1_c1: I-Bitcoin ikuvumela ukuthola izinkokhelo ngqo kumakhasimende akho, njengokwemali engokoqobo. Inethiwekhi ye-Bitcoin isebenza ngaphandle kwabaphakathi njengamabhange nezinkampani zamakhadi esikweletu ezithatha izimali ezinkulu.
biz_s2_c1: Njengokwemali engokoqobo, izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin zikhokhelwa ngokushesha. Awudingi ukulinda inkampani yakho yamakhadi esikweletu noma ibhange ukukukhokha. Kunalokho, uthola ukufinyelela emalini yakho ngokushesha.
biz_s3_c1: Ngoba izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin zenzeka ngqo phakathi kwakho namakhasimende akho, akwenzeki ukuthi umuntu abuyise imali yakho ngokubuyiswa kwemali.
biz_s3_c2: I-Bitcoin eyinkohliso ayikwazi ukuthunyelwa ku-Bitcoin Network, okusho ukuthi awudingi ukukhathazeka ngokwenzeka okukhohliswayo okungabiza ibhizinisi lakho imali.
biz_s4_c1: Izigidi zabantu zinayo i-Bitcoin futhi zifuna ukuyisebenzisa ezindaweni eziyamukelayo.
biz_s4_c2: Ngokumane wamukele i-Bitcoin, ibhizinisi lakho lingafakwa kumabalazwe abathengisi be-Bitcoin futhi lithole ukuvezwa kwamahhala kumakhasimende amasha e-Bitcoin.
biz_s4_c3: Ukwamukela i-Bitcoin kumahhala ngokuphelele. Azikho izinkontileka noma izimali ezifihliwe.
